name: G M A T

name: Aj Limousines Inc

fit_notes: Van Nuys limousine service led by Alan Jay; 4 employees, ~$294K revenue. Website returned HTTP 520; appears to be a chauffeur/limo company, not a school bus operator. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in.

name: Map Transport LLC
recent_news: BBB accredited; SBA Small Business and SWaM (Small, Women-owned, Minority-owned Business) Certified.
fit_notes: SWaM-certified woman/minority-owned NEMT provider in Bassett/Martinsville-Henry County, VA (6 employees, ~$294K revenue). Medical transport focus, no school bus contracts identified. Sub-scale and outside Summit's K-12 service line.
